license_modal.title: 🔑 Activate license
license_modal.hint: Paste your license UUID (we email it to you after signup).

quota.free_exhausted_title: 🛑 You've hit the Free 30 min/day limit.
quota.free_exhausted_body: MiLoro resumes tomorrow at 00:00 UTC, or

model.vad_hint: 💡 VAD detects voice and trims silences at start/end. Recommended OFF for short phrases (it may cut starting words). ON for long audio.
model.first_download_hint: 💡 The first time you use a model it downloads automatically. Nothing to do on your side.

behavior.ptt_hint: 💡 Hold this key and speak. Release to transcribe. The text is pasted wherever your cursor is.
behavior.status_tags_hint: 💡 Top banner "🦜 Listening…" and "✏️ Transcribing…". Turn off for a more minimal UI.

vocabulary.placeholder: Technical words, proper nouns, punctuation marks so the model recognises them better. E.g.: 'Anthropic, Claude, How's it going?'
vocabulary.hint: 💡 Biases the Whisper model towards your jargon + punctuation. It's NOT added to the final text, only helps transcribe better.

autotext.prefix_label: Prefix (added at the start of transcribed text)
autotext.prefix_placeholder: E.g.: 'You are a helpful assistant. Reply:'
autotext.hint: 💡 Useful if you dictate for an AI and want to add a fixed prompt at the start or end automatically.

system.autolaunch_hint: So you don't have to open the app every time you start your computer.
system.autoupdate_hint: On launch, MiLoro checks miloro.app. If there's a new version, it downloads + installs with your confirmation.
system.installed_restart: Update {v} installed. Restart MiLoro to apply.

test_recording.empty_hint: Click "Test recording 5s" below or hold the PTT key to dictate
test_recording.autosave_hint: Changes are saved automatically when you change any option

devices.title: My active devices
devices.note: 💡 To deactivate devices from other machines: open MiLoro on that machine and deactivate it from there.
